mapper.select: /* 메인화면용 공지사항 list*/ SELECT A1.* FROM ( SELECT NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd , TITLE AS title FROM DOCS_NOTICE WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY NOTICE_CD DESC ) A1 LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM DOCS_NOTICE request WHERE 1 = 1
AND request.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{insertStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{insertEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'
AND DEL_YN = 'N'
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND INSERT_UID = #{insertUserNm}

SELECT req.NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd ,req.TITLE AS noticeTitle ,req.CONTENTS AS contents ,req.HIT_COUNT AS hitCount ,req.START_DT AS startDt ,req.END_DT AS endDt ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER tmp WHERE tmp.USER_ID = req.INSERT_UID ) AS insertUserNm FROM DOCS_NOTICE req WHERE req.NOTICE_CD = #{noticeCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(NOTICE_CD),1)+1 AS noticeCd FROM DOCS_NOTICE
INSERT INTO DOCS_NOTICE ( NOTICE_CD , TITLE , INSERT_UID , CONTENTS ,INSERT_DT ,DEL_YN ,START_DT ,END_DT ) VALUES ( #{noticeCd} , #{noticeTitle} , #{sessionUser.userId} , #{contents} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,'N' ,replace(#{startDt}, '-', '') ,replace(#{endDt}, '-', '') )
mapper.select: SELECT req.NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd ,req.TITLE AS title ,req.INSERT_UID AS insertUserNm FROM DOCS_NOTICE req WHERE req.NOTICE_CD = #{noticeCd}
SELECT req.INSERT_UID AS insertUserNm FROM DOCS_NOTICE req where req.NOTICE_CD = 1
SELECT NOTICE_CD , FILE_NO , FILE_PATH , SUBSTRING(FILE_PATH FROM POSITION('\\' IN FILE_PATH) + 1) AS fileNm FROM DOCS_NOTICE_FILE WHERE NOTICE_CD = #{noticeCd}
mapper.delete: /* 현재 파일은 하나만 업로드 가능하므로 새로운 파일이 업로드 되면 기존 모든 파일을 삭제 해야 함.*/ DELETE FROM DOCS_NOTICE_FILE WHERE NOTICE_CD = #{noticeCd}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(FILE_NO AS INTEGER)),0)+1 AS fileNo FROM DOCS_NOTICE_FILE
INSERT INTO DOCS_NOTICE_FILE ( NOTICE_CD , FILE_NO , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_PATH_OUTSIDE , FILE_SIZE , UPLOAD_USER_CD , UPLOAD_DT , DEL_YN , UPLOAD_FILE_NM ) VALUES ( #{noticeCd} , CAST(#{fileNo} AS INTEGER) , #{fileNm} , #{filePath} , #{filePathOutside} , CAST(#{fileSize} AS INTEGER) , #{sessionUser.userCd} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , 'N' , #{fileNm} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM DOCS_NOTICE_FILE WHERE NOTICE_CD = #{noticeCd} AND FILE_NO = CAST(#{fileNo} AS INTEGER)
SELECT req.NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd ,req.TITLE AS title ,req.INSERT_UID AS insertUserNm ,req.START_DT AS startDt ,req.END_DT AS endDt FROM DOCS_NOTICE req WHERE req.NOTICE_CD = #{noticeCd}

SELECT docsUser.* , company.COMPANY_NM , company.BIZ_NO , company.DIST_PURCHASER_USER_CD AS purchaserUid , dept.TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD AS teamLeaderUid , 'N' AS passUseYn FROM DOCS_USER docsUser LEFT JOIN DOCS_COMPANY company ON docsUser.COMPANY_CD = company.COMPANY_CD LEFT JOIN DOCS_DEPT dept ON docsUser.DEPT_CD = dept.DEPT_CD WHERE docsUser.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT rel.ROLE_CODE AS roleCd , menu.MENU_TYPE FROM ITS_REL_ROLE_GROUP rel JOIN DOCS_MENU menu ON rel.ROLE_CODE = menu.ROLE_CD WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{roleGroup}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TITLE AS noticeTitle, CONTENTS AS contents, NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd FROM DOCS_NOTICE WHERE START_DT <= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND END_DT >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS sub
